name: Speeding
description: Driving above the legally permitted speed limit on highways or urban roads. Increases the risk of accidents and reduces driver reaction time.

name: Running a Red Light
description: Failing to stop at a traffic light when it shows red. This offence significantly endangers pedestrians and other motorists.

name: Driving Without Seatbelt
description: Operating a vehicle without wearing a seatbelt. This reduces personal safety in the event of a collision.

name: Using Phone While Driving
description: Using a handheld mobile device while operating a vehicle. Distracted driving greatly increases crash risk.

name: Driving Without Valid License
description: Operating a vehicle without a valid driver's license issued by the appropriate authority. Indicates non-compliance with driver certification laws.

name: Illegal Parking
description: Parking a vehicle in restricted or unauthorized areas such as intersections or pedestrian crossings. Causes traffic obstruction and safety hazards.

name: Driving Against Traffic
description: Driving in the opposite direction of designated traffic flow. This creates a high risk of head-on collisions.

name: Failure to Obey Traffic Signs
description: Ignoring regulatory or warning traffic signs on the road. Undermines road order and safety compliance.

name: Overloading Passengers
description: Carrying more passengers than the vehicle is legally permitted to transport. Compromises vehicle stability and passenger safety.

name: Driving Without Vehicle Registration
description: Operating a vehicle without valid registration documents. Violates regulatory compliance requirements.

name: Failure to Use Helmet (Motorcyclist)
description: Riding a motorcycle without wearing an approved safety helmet. Increases the likelihood of fatal head injuries.

name: Reckless Driving
description: Operating a vehicle in a manner that shows willful disregard for safety rules. Poses serious danger to road users.

name: Expired Vehicle Insurance
description: Driving a vehicle without valid third-party insurance coverage. Exposes other road users to financial risk in accidents.

name: Obstructing Traffic
description: Stopping or parking a vehicle in a way that blocks the normal flow of traffic. Causes congestion and potential hazards.

name: Driving Under the Influence
description: Operating a vehicle while impaired by alcohol or drugs. Severely reduces judgment, coordination, and reaction time.
